fixes_applied: Implemented Optimistic UI (Ghost Card) in Activity Hub for instant feedback.
Fixed reconciliation logic to ensure Ghost Card persists until DB record is confirmed in the list.
Enabled STOP ALL and individual platform cancellation on the optimistic Ghost Card.
Fixed 'Upload result not found' error by implementing cancelPlatformByPostAction for optimistic platform cancellation.
Implemented individual platform progress bars with animated background fills and percentage indicators.
Resolved UI unresponsiveness by fixing CSS z-index overlap on progress bars.
Implemented immediate visual feedback for cancellation using local 'cancelledIds' state.
Ensured automatic cleanup of active indicators (bars, dots) after successful upload or stop.
Generalized status messages and removed all chat emojis to comply with project standards.
Ensured immediate redirect from Dashboard to Activity Hub.

conditions: Ghost Card appears instantly in Activity Hub after redirection.
Individual progress bars animate correctly for each platform.
STOP ALL button and preparation bars hide immediately upon cancellation or success.
All Playwright tests (8/8) passed including individual progress verification.
Zero chat emojis in user-facing status messages.

qa-agent.details: Verified Ghost Card persistence, individual platform progress bars, STOP ALL functionality, and automatic end-state cleanup. All 8 tests in upload-visibility.spec.ts passed.
